subcodes.first_line: May the clouds of thy Lord's mercy, the All-Highest, encompass those hills and mounds, and may the showers of His bounties perfume that fragrant tomb [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حیا سحائب رحمه ربک الاعلی تلک التلول و الربی و طیب الرمس المعنبر صیب الطاف
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @visitation Tablets, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @love of God
